title: AVM (Always Visible Mobs)
description: Allows u to see spiders and endermen even when they are invisible
body:
The Always Visible Mobs pack allows you to see spiders even when invisble! This is done by changing the texture for the spider eyes layer to cover the whole body. I plan on later adding the enderman too since it uses something simlar with its eyes so stayed tuned for that!

will prob colorise the textures next update
